programs.desc: Team Freedia cleans up the site of Hotel Freedia; Freedia debuts her new gospel song during her Louisiana Philharmonic performance.

programs.title: Fatal Addiction: Michael Jackson
programs.desc: Family, friends and fellow musicians describe the life of the child prodigy turned king of pop Michael Jackson over his four-decade career, from his rise to fame to his later battle with tabloids.

programs.title: Michael Jackson: Chase the Truth
programs.desc: Close friends, former staff and researchers paint an intimate portrait of pop star Michael Jackson's complicated world and put allegations of sexual abuse under the microscope.

programs.title: The Manson Murders
programs.desc: A dive into the murders committed by the Manson Family in July and August of 1969, including the brutal killing of Sharon Tate.
